roa.docketEntryComment: THE COURT ORDERS A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO THE NAMED VICTIMSAND THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION IN THIS MATTER
DEF ADD TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO RELEASE SDT RECORDS FILED

/CAL: SENTENCING/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 2 Y:PJ  131D/CTS: 131/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X: COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO STAY FINES AND FEES/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/CTORD: ANKLE MONITORING AND HOME DETENTION TERMS ARE HEREBY VACATED/CTORD: ACM CONDITIONS ARE HEREBY VACATED/SAORD/SA1: MEYLING AUXI LIADORA GUTIERREZ/SA2: METRO PCS AT 1111 MARKET STREET INSAN FRANCISCO/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THEADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT: 03-26-20/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU: COUNSEL/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 01-17-20/TE:2 WEEKS/CONTD: JURY TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT EXCL: THE COURT/WIT SWORN DA:MAILING GUTIERREZ/EXHMA:PEO 1 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTO/EXHMA:PEO 2 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTO/EXHMA:PEO 3 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTO/EXHMA:PEO 4 - 8,5 X 11INCH BLACK & WHITE PHOTO/EXHMA:PEO 5 - 8,5 X 11 INCH BLACK & WHITE PHOTO//EXHMA:PEO 6 DVD WITH VIDEO/EXHMA:DEF A - THUMB DRIVE WITH VIDEO/EXHMA:DEFB - THUMB DRIVE WITH BODY WORN CAMERA VIDEO/X:THE PEOPLE MOVE TO ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE COUNT 4, PC245(A)(1), A FELONY BASED ON TESTIMONY GIVEN/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:THE COURT REDUCES COUNT 2 TO A MISDEMEANOR/HTA1:1/X:THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION ASSOCIATED WITH COUNT 1 TO BE TRUE/CTORD:COUNTS 2 & 3 ARE CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT/ACM/X:DEFENDANT'SCUSTODIAL STATUS IS HOME DETENTION WITH GPS ANKLE MONITOR/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/NTW60/LD:11-05-19/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/SA2:1111 MARKET ST,, SF/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:09-24-19/987,2/X:MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS DENIED/BAIL:250,000/SA1:MEYLING GUTIERREZ/SA2:1111 MARKET ST,, SF/CONTD:PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/
/CAL: PTC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PREHRG CONF/TN:ANTOINE DESHAWN JUSTIN/X:MOTION TO REMOVE ANKLE MONITOR/MO DENIED/LDPX:11-05-19/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/BAIL:250,000/DOP/
